meaning: n.阿迪达斯运动服(或运动鞋等)
examples: Adidas is an official sponsor of the World Cup, so its logo appears on the field.
It was the only piece of advertising that Adidas conducted in Germany throughout the tournament.
This boosts the reputation and image of Adidas by making people more aware of the company's values.
The 15-time All-Star was an Adidas athlete for the first six years of his career.
"Whole different story, " explained Vlasic, who now wears a custom-built pair of spikes by Adidas.
